component.name: SteamPortfolio
component.summary: Track your Steam CS2 inventory value with price history and alerts

description.p: SteamPortfolio is a local-first desktop app for tracking your Steam CS2 inventory. It fetches live prices from the Steam Community Market, records acquisition cost and date for every item, and alerts you when items hit 2×/3×/4× gains or drop from their all-time high.

ul.li: Live prices from the Steam Community Market
Acquisition cost tracking with market and inventory history import
Price gain and all-time-high drop alerts via system notifications
Stacked display for duplicate items (×99 Recoil Case)
All data stored locally in SQLite — nothing leaves your machine
